free_text: Cross section differences in the interaction of He-3
with nuclei of Ni-58 and Ni-64
thick 550 micro-m and full-absorption detector on basis
The integral disintegration cross sections of He-3 are
estimated. 380+-100 mb for Ni-58 and 340+-90 mb
A systematic uncertainty in going over
to absolute cross-section values does not exceed 15%.
